title: Semos Villagers Compat Pack
description: Use multiple of my villagers pack at the same time
body:
This pack let you use multiple of my villagers packs, namely [**[**<font color="#008000">**Hermitcraft Villagers**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hermitcraft-villagers), [**[**<font color="#008000">**Songs Of War Villagers**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/songs-of-war-villagers) and [**[**<font color="#008000">**Alex and Steve Villagers**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alex-and-steve-villagers)

This pack uses some [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)/[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) exclusive features and therefore <font color="#f02222">**is not compatible with optifine!**</font>

Keep track of what versions of my packs are compatible with wich addon version with this file: [[<font color="#daa520">with this link</font>](https://1drv.ms/x/c/5017ea34619ff0f9/EYARtfWSbd1IsoYWCn7M-CkBHKTpT6MVfBMwl93LenDkAg?e=dbVTA0)]
![Textures example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb5d1fe6473e7a63eb386a9c46bd52dafbcc3ac2.png)

# <font color="#daa520">Instruction:</font>

<font color="#f02222">They are different files for different combinaison of pack. Choose the right one!</font>

You need the [Semos Villagers Compat Pack 2.0.0 (Model_1 Fix)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/semos-villagers-compat-pack/version/61spboaO) pack to be on the very bottom of your ressource pack list and the matching compat pack of your choice at the very top!
If you use Fresh animations or any other pack changing villager, it need to be below my packs!!

Example:
![Pack order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/613b946c7be24da9bea710e5dde6757ba1cff6c8.png)
